questionHtml:
Which pituitary hormones regulate the human menstrual cycle?

A.  FSH and LH

B.  Progesterone and estrogen

C.  HCG and estrogen

D.  FSH and oxytocin

meta.title: Which pituitary hormones regulate the human menstrual cycle? A. FSH and LH B. Progesterone and estrogen C. HCG and estrogen D. FSH and oxytocin
